name: My Little Pony:Rpg
description:
My Little Pony:Rpg

"My Little Pony: Friendship Is Magic is an American animated television series based on Hasbro's My Little Pony franchise. The series follows a studious pony named Twilight Sparkle, her dragon assistant Spike and her friends Applejack,Rarity,Fluttershy,Rainbow Dash and Pinkie Pie.They go on adventures and help others around Equestria, solving problems with their friendships"
creator: Vanadium
